response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering across multiple languages and domains, including experimentation systems (Shopify pricing optimization) and AI tooling (Stripe). However, his background lacks explicit evidence of building large-scale growth/experimentation platforms at enterprise scale, which is a core requirement. His open-source and startup experience is strong but doesn't fully align with the role's focus on systemic experimentation frameworks.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with experience in distributed systems (Shopify, Stripe)
Proven ability to lead multi-workstream initiatives and ship systemic solutions (AI tooling at Stripe)
Deep technical leadership in architecture, testing, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Limited direct experience with enterprise-scale experimentation systems (e.g., feature flagging, telemetry foundations)
No clear evidence of building measurement/rollout automation platforms across multiple teams
Lacks demonstrated experience with high-availability multi-region systems
